codeReview.summary: The implementation matches the feature requirements: commit cd61bf7 adds step3.txt containing exactly 'gamma', and the worker transcript/handoff shows the step2 precondition and cross-file existence check were reviewed.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mission guidance points workers to `.factory/skills/file-writer/SKILL.md`, but that file is absent in both the mission and repository state reviewed here, so the documented worker procedure is not actually available for inspection.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md says `See .factory/skills/file-writer/SKILL.md for the worker procedure`, but Read on `/Users/serkan/.factory/skills/file-writer/SKILL.md` and `/Users/serkan/mcp-droid/.factory/skills/file-writer/SKILL.md` returned ENOENT.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission transcripts reference repository paths like `/Users/serkan/mcp-droid/.factory/services.yaml`, but the repository-local `.factory` tree currently only contains validation artifacts, so those documented service/library files are not actually present for future workers.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Read on `/Users/serkan/mcp-droid/.factory/services.yaml` and `/Users/serkan/mcp-droid/.factory/library/architecture.md` returned ENOENT; LS of `/Users/serkan/mcp-droid/.factory` showed only `validation/`.

summary: Pass. The reviewed commit correctly adds `step3.txt` with `gamma` and no actionable code defects were found for this feature. Shared-state gaps exist around missing skill/service documentation files referenced by the mission.
